title: Entity Teleport To Owner Behavior
description: Allows an entity to teleport to its owner.

cooldown.title: Cooldown
cooldown.description: The time in seconds that must pass for the entity to be able to try to teleport again.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Conditions to be satisfied for the entity to teleport to its owner.

Properties:
• domain (object)
• operator (object)
• subject (object)
• test (string)
• value (object)

Sample values:
• parrot: {"all_of":[{"test":"owner_distance","operator":...

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
